name: My Script
description: A short description of what this script does.

parameters.name: input_file
parameters.label: Input file
parameters.description: Pick a single file. Use 'extensions' to filter the browser dialog.

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.label: Output folder
parameters.description: Pick a folder. The script should create it with os.makedirs if it doesn't exist.

parameters.name: label_text
parameters.label: Label / title
parameters.description: A short free-text field (single line). Shown as a QLineEdit.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.label: Notes
parameters.description: A multi-line free-text area (QTextEdit). Good for comments or long descriptions.

parameters.name: frame_count
parameters.label: Number of frames
parameters.description: Integer spinner (QSpinBox). Use 'min' and 'max' to set limits.

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Method
parameters.description: Drop-down list (QComboBox). Value will be one of the strings in 'options'.

parameters.name: linked_csv
parameters.label: CSV from previous step
parameters.description: Auto-filled from a previous script's output using 'link'. Still editable by the user.

outputs.result_csv: Path to the main output CSV
outputs.figures_dir: Path to the folder containing generated figures
